visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with styled brown hair, wearing a reddish-brown button-down jacket over a black hoodie, stands on a busy urban sidewalk. He holds a folded paper pamphlet. A woman with long dark hair, wearing a white knitted sweater over a white shirt, stands behind him. They are in a street environment in Taiwan with various storefronts and parked motorbikes visible in the background. (2) The scene cuts to a wide shot of the 'KEBUKE' tea shop at a street corner, featuring a dark blue exterior with a large green billboard above it. Pedestrians and motorcycles are seen around the entrance. Then, a vintage photo of the shop's original green stall appears as an overlay, showing a more humble beginning. (3) The host stands in front of the 'Yi Mu Ri' shop. An old photo shows the shop's appearance in 2012 with rows of motorbikes parked outside. The host is then seen drinking from a white paper cup with a yellow straw, while the woman beside him also takes a sip. They are in an open outdoor area with a modern building and clear sky. (4) The host walks towards the camera wearing a black hoodie. The background changes to the 'Chun Shui Tang' original store, which is built in a traditional Chinese architectural style with blue tiled roofs and red lanterns. Trees and urban buildings frame the setting. (5) The host holds two different paper cups, one white and one yellow, comparing their designs. He points to the text on the yellow cup. The scene is shot at eye-level in an outdoor setting with green foliage and parked cars in the background. The lighting throughout is natural daylight.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 可不可的創始店就在. [Slogan]: 台中市西區向上路一段191號. (2) [Slogan]: 2008年就在這裡. (3) [Variety]: 可不可最一開始的樣子. (4) [Subtitle]: 它還是蠻樸實的. (5) [Logo]: KEBUKE. (6) [Slogan]: 一沐日創始店 2012年就開了. (7) [Subtitle]: 哦蕎麥. [Variety]: (喝喝蕎麥茶粉粿). (8) [Variety]: 嘎哥喜歡. (9) [Subtitle]: 它的粉粿是屬於鼻涕掛的. (10) [Slogan]: 春水堂 · 四維創始店. (11) [Subtitle]: 鼎鼎大名. [Subtitle]: 陽羨茶行. (12) [Slogan]: 老賴茶棧-台中中華店. (13) [Subtitle]: 這是他改成老賴茶棧之後的. (14) [Variety]: 創始發源是在第二市場. (15) [Slogan]: a black tea station. (16) [Logo]: LIKE TEA SHOP.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male host and 1 female companion appear throughout the video as main characters.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Male host has brown hair, wears a brown jacket over a black hoodie. Female companion has long black hair and wears a white sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Various urban street locations in Taichung, featuring modern storefronts, traditional Chinese architecture, parked motorcycles, and large billboards.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male speaker begins with a high-pitched, energetic voice and a fast speech rate. No background music is present initially. The ambient noise floor is a low-level urban hum typical of an outdoor street recording. (2) A loud, sharp slurping sound is heard as the host drinks from a cup. A mid-tempo acoustic pop BGM with a steady guitar rhythm and light drums enters at a low volume. (3) A female voice speaks briefly in a casual, friendly tone with clear articulation. The BGM volume remains consistent as a soft background bed under the conversational speech of both individuals. (4) A 'whoosh' sound effect transition occurs. The male speaker's vocal arousal increases as he emphasizes brand names and dates. The background music maintains an upbeat, positive energy. (5) Incidental sounds of paper rustling are audible as a pamphlet is moved. The speech density is very high, with the primary male speaker talking almost continuously. The ambient city noise is still perceptible. (6) A final percussive 'pop' SFX marks a scene change. The male speaker's voice remains dominant and authoritative until the end of the clip, with the BGM fading slightly as the video concludes.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Intro of Store 1 -> Intro of Store 2 -> Intro of Store 3 -> Intro of Store 4 -> Comparison -> Outro.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a food-themed travel vlog that introduces and visits the original locations of famous Taiwanese bubble tea brands, providing historical context and comparisons of their growth.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses historical photo overlays to contrast the humble beginnings of tea brands with their current commercial success.
